fieldValues.value: May write up and maintain the decision log, Articles, and role records. May flag when a proposed action appears inconsistent with a recorded decision or article. Responsible for ensuring that Article A-006 (On ending) obligations are discharged when the time comes.

Cannot decide what is shown or how it is installed. The Clerk's role is to maintain the record faithfully — not to determine its content. Cannot amend a decision unilaterally; can only record what the group has agreed.
Established by Article A-004 (How we make decisions).
